nasb.text: As for these four youths, God gave them knowledge and intelligence in every branch of literature and wisdom; Daniel even understood all kinds of visions and dreams.

esv.text: As for these four youths, God gave them learning and skill in all literature and wisdom, and Daniel had understanding in all visions and dreams.

cnv.text: 這四個年輕人在各種文字和學問上，　神都賜他們知識和聰明；但以理並且能明白一切異象和異夢。

ccb.text: 上帝使这四个青年精通各样学问和知识。但以理能明白各种异象和梦兆。
